I can’t believe I actually talked my way into the final two with the Virgin! Poor Oswin, no wonder your "Investigator" info was such a mess—being the Drunk is a rough way to go. GG everyone, what a wild finish!
Oof, an Imp endgame with the Virgin still alive — brutal. I’m honestly impressed Gregor survived that long; the Poisoner/Drunk chaos did a great job muddying everything.
